title: CatBoost seed selected by low correlation
summary: Choose a CatBoost seed by balancing OOF AUC and low correlation with the RealMLP core.
rationale: The current best parent is 001199 with CV 0.9544491320 and public 0.95409. This hypothesis is an atomic child patch intended to exploit the confirmed two-seed RealMLP core plus low-weight CatBoost correction direction.
implementation_hint: Start from 001199. Train a small set of CatBoost seeds, compute each seed OOF AUC and correlation to the RealMLP core OOF, select a seed with good AUC and lower correlation, then use it as the CatBoost correction. Keep selection logic explicit in the code.
expected_effect: Improve complementary correction rather than maximizing CatBoost solo AUC.
risk: OOF-based seed selection may overfit and increase runtime.
